name: Pawn1st
description_short: Scottsdale, AZ pawn shop Pawn1st offers quick loans and buying/selling services near 3116 N Scottsdale Rd.
description_long:
Pawn1st is located at 3116 N Scottsdale Rd in Scottsdale, AZ, in a standalone facility. The shop operates Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 7 PM, making it convenient for Scottsdale residents to visit during weekdays or Saturday mornings.

At this Scottsdale location, you can pawn valuables, sell items, or take out short-term loans against jewelry, electronics, and collectibles. Call (480) 990-3739 to ask about specific items or current rates for your pawn or sale.

If you need quick cash in Scottsdale, bring a valid ID and your item(s) for evaluation. This independent pawn shop serves the Scottsdale community with fair pricing and fast transactions.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America with online store locator
Non-recourse pawn loans—borrowers not personally liable if unable to repay
Buys nearly any item of value (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods) and pays cash on the spot
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment option
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing financial transparency and stability
Specializes in gold, silver, and precious metal purchasing for immediate cash
Subsidiary AFF provides lease-to-own and retail finance through 15,000+ merchant partners nationwide
Approximately 22,000 employees ensures consistent operations and customer service
cons: Borrowing capacity strictly limited by collateral value—cannot borrow more than pledged item worth
Pledged items are forfeited and liquidated if loan not repaid, resulting in permanent loss of property
Pawn loans typically carry high interest rates (not disclosed on website, but industry standard)
Requires physical collateral, making it unsuitable for those without valuable possessions to pledge
Limited to small non-recourse loans—not suitable for large financing needs like mortgages or major debt consolidation
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers needing immediate short-term funds secured by personal property they own
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they're willing to temporarily pledge for fast loans
Budget shoppers seeking affordable used merchandise through FirstCash retail locations
Consumers with gold or precious metals to sell for quick cash without appraisal delays
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers who own valuable personal property and need quick access to funds without credit checks or recourse liability. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral for the loan term, and failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item—making this suitable only for short-term emergencies, not ongoing credit needs.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property
Purchase of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Retail sales of used merchandise across 3,300+ store locations
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying at cash-on-spot rates
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary network (15,000+ merchant partners)
Online store locator to find nearest FirstCash location by state
Merchandise inventory search and viewing online
Point-of-sale payment solutions for consumer goods
FAQs and educational resources on pawn loans and services
meta_description: Pawn1st at 3116 N Scottsdale Rd, Scottsdale, AZ. Quick cash loans and buying/selling.
